name: trading-execution
description: Venue-abstracted execution across the two tax tracks — PaperVenue (working, no creds) plus VT Markets (MetaApi/MT5) and IG spread-bet real-path stubs — with Telegram control (/halt /flat /status /size), a kill-switch, reconciliation, and UK tax records. A FastAPI execution service the bridge routes to, plus an execution MCP.
